# An Enquiry Concerning the Principles of Morals

*[David Hume](../philosophers/hume.md) · 1751*

Hume's mature statement of his moral philosophy, which he regarded as his best work. He there derives the virtues from their felt usefulness and agreeableness, anchoring moral distinctions in sentiment rather than reason.
